attachment_metadata_list_sys_id_file_nam: Attachment metadata list (sys_id, file_name, content_type, download_link)
comma_separated_fields_to_compute_the_ma: Comma-separated fields to compute the maximum of
comma_separated_fields_to_compute_the_mi: Comma-separated fields to compute the minimum of
comma_separated_fields_to_group_results_: Comma-separated fields to group results by
create_a_new_servicenow_incident_record_: Create a new ServiceNow incident record with the right category, priority, and description.
create_read_update_and_delete_servicenow: Create, read, update, and delete ServiceNow records
display_value_mode_for_reference_fields: Display value mode for reference fields
integrate_servicenow_into_your_workflow_: Integrate ServiceNow into your workflow. Create, read, update, and delete records in any ServiceNow table including incidents, tasks, change requests, users, and more.
maximum_number_of_attachments_to_return: Maximum number of attachments to return
name_of_the_file_to_upload: Name of the file to upload
name_to_give_the_uploaded_file: Name to give the uploaded file
number_of_records_to_skip_for_pagination: Number of records to skip for pagination
query_a_servicenow_table_for_records_mat: Query a ServiceNow table for records matching a condition and return the matching rows.
reference_a_file_from_previous_blocks_e_: Reference a file from previous blocks (e.g., {{block_1.output.file}})
return_display_values_for_reference_fiel: Return display values for reference fields instead of sys_ids
return_the_count_of_matching_records: Return the count of matching records
servicenow_user_with_web_service_access: ServiceNow user with web service access
sys_id_of_the_attachment_to_download_fro: sys_id of the attachment to download (from List Attachments)
sys_id_of_the_record_the_attachment_belo: sys_id of the record the attachment belongs to
update_fields_on_an_existing_servicenow_: Update fields on an existing ServiceNow record, such as state, assignment, or work notes.
